46- vè;{k] ¯gn etnwj lHkk (,p,e,l) lnL; 47- vij lfpo o fodkl vk;qDr (lw{e] y?kq ,oa eè;e m|e)] lnL; lfpo&insu lw{e] y?kq ,oa eè;e m|e ea=kky; ¹la- 1(3)@2011&,u,l,e,l,ebZº vejsUæ flUgk] vij lfpo vkSj fodkl vk;qDr (,e,l,ebZ) -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th May, 2013 S.O. 1375(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006) read with rule 3 of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Rules, 2006 and in supersession of the notification of Government of India, Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises vide, number S.O. 29(E), dated the 7th January, 2010, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 7th January, 2010 except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby establishes the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises for the purposes of the said Act, which shall consist of the following members, namely:— 1. Shri K.H. Muniappa, Minister of State (Independent Charge) Chairperson-ex officio M/o Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, New Delhi 2. To be nominated Vice Chairperson-ex officio 3. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Haryana Member-ex officio 4. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Chattisgarh Member-ex officio 5. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Odisha Member-ex officio 6. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Goa Member-ex officio 7. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Andhra Pradesh Member-ex officio 8. Minister in-charge of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, State of Mizoram Member-ex officio 9. Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha)To be nominated Member 10. Shri Hansraj G. Ahir, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Member 11. Shri Rasheed Masood, Member of Parliament Member 12. Administrator (Lieutenant Governor) of Puducherry Member 13. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Micro, Member-ex officio Small and Medium Enterprises 14. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Member-ex officio Department of Commerce 15. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue Member-ex officio 16. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Labour and Employment Member-ex officio 17. Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Food Processing Industries Member-ex officio 18. Chairman, National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Member-ex officio 19. Chairman and Managing Director, Small Industries Development Bank of India Member-ex officio 20. Chairman, Indian Banks’ Association Member-ex officio 21. Deputy Governor, Reserve Bank of India Member 22. The President, Confederation of Women Entrepreneurs, Hyderabad Member 23. The President, Bihar Mahila Udyog Sangh, 47B, Savitri Sadan, Member Near Nehru Nagar, Patna-800013 24. Engineering Manufacturers Entrepreneurs Resource Group (EMerg) Member 25. Dalit India Chamber of Commerceand Industry, Parmar Chambers, Pune Member 26. The Kannur Tiny and Small Industrial Development, Member Jaison Building Nr. Sangeetha Talkies, Kerala 27. Sir M. Vishweshwaraiah District Industries Welfare Association, KOLAR Member 28. The President, Udaipur Chamber of Commerce & Industry (UCCI), Member Chamber Bhawan, Chamber Marg, M.I.A., Udiapur-313001 29. The President, Brotiwala Nalagadh Industries Association, Himachal Pradesh Member 30. The President, Indian Industries Association, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh Member 31. The President, Federation of Industries and Commerce of North Eastern Region Member (FINER) -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 32. The President, Federation of Gujarat Industries, FGI Business Centre, Member Gotri Sevsi Bhadodra 33. The President, Peenya Industries Association, Bangalore Member 34. Chairman, Confederation of Indian Industries (CII), SME Chapter, New Delhi Member 35. The President, Chambers of Commerce and Industries of North Eastern Region, Member Guwahati 36. The President, North East Women Entrepreneurs Association, Guwahati Member 37. Daman Industries Association, Daman Member 38. Gems and Jewellery Export Promotion Council, Mumbai Member 39. Chairman, SME Chapter FICCI, New Delhi Member 40. Chairman, SME Chapter ASSOCHAM, New Delhi Member 41. Chairman, SME Chapter PHD Chamber of Commerce and Industry, Member New Delhi (PHDCCI) 42. P. Murugasan, Managing Director, M/s Saarc Tool Tech. Pvt. Ltd., Coimbatore Member 43. Ms. Prathibha, PSK Naidu Road, Bangalore Member 44. Praveen Chopra, Lajpat Nagar, Delhi Member 45. The President, Indian National Trade Union Congress (INTUC), Member 46. The President, Hind Mazdoor, Sabha (HMS) Member 47. Additional Secretary and Development Commissioner Member Secretary- (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises), Ministry of Micro, ex officio Small and Medium Enterprises [No. 1(3)/2011-NSMSME] AMARENDRA SINHA, Addl. Secy. and Development Commissioner (MSME) Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 4 of 4 --
